config.title: Drukarka fiskalna #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
function fopen() : fopen = true dim strValue : strValue = doc_.system.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,"HKLM_PATH","HKLM_PRINTER_TYPE_SETTINGS") if isNumeric(strValue) then page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PRINTER_MODEL).value = clng(strValue) else page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PRINTER_MODEL).value = clng(0) end if end function
function fok doc_.system.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,"HKLM_PATH","HKLM_PRINTER_TYPE_SETTINGS") = cstr(page_.ctrl(CTRLID_PRINTER_MODEL).value) page_.goback end function
function fcancel page_.goback end function
'msgbox #include "50122"
function status
dim strValue : strValue = doc_.system.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,"HKLM_PATH","HKLM_PRINTER_TYPE_SETTINGS") dim nModelNr if isNumeric(strValue) then nModelNr = clng(strValue) else nModelNr = clng(0) end if
dim idModule select case nModelNr case 1 idModule = PAGE_MODULE_ELZAB_PRINTER case 2 idModule = PAGE_MODULE_POSNET_PRINTER case else MessageBox "Nie został wybrany żadny model drukarki fiskalnej", "Wydruk paragonu fiskalnego", vbOKOnly, vbInformation make_paragon_fisk_on_sprzedaz = false exit function end select
dim pModule set pModule = doc_.getmodule(idModule) pModule.print_status()
end function
function day_raport
if MessageBox("Zostanie wydrukowany raport dobowy z kasy fiskalnej. Czy chcesz kontynuować?", "Raport dobowy", vbYesNo, vbQuestion) = vbYes then dim strValue : strValue = doc_.system.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,"HKLM_PATH","HKLM_PRINTER_TYPE_SETTINGS") dim nModelNr if isNumeric(strValue) then nModelNr = clng(strValue) else nModelNr = clng(0) end if
dim idModule select case nModelNr case 1 idModule = PAGE_MODULE_ELZAB_PRINTER case 2 idModule = 60310 case else MessageBox "Nie został wybrany żadny model drukarki fiskalnej", "Wydruk paragonu fiskalnego", vbOKOnly, vbInformation make_paragon_fisk_on_sprzedaz = false exit function end select
dim pModule set pModule = doc_.getmodule(idModule) pModule.print_day_raport()
end if
end function
function comm_settings
dim pNewHli set pNewHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_FORM_COMM_PORT_SETTINGS")
dim pPage:set pPage=doc_.getpagehli(pNewHli) if pPage is nothing then exit function end if
pPage.setup "Konfiguracja portu drukarki fiskalnej" , "HKLM_PRINTER_SETTINGS"
pPage.domodalauto
set pPage=nothing
end function

page.body:
Model
Elzab FP-600 i zgodne POSNET DF-301
QXE_BUTTON(-1,20,Konfiguracja portu,varFunction=comm_settings)
QXE_BUTTON(-1,20,Raport dzienny,varFunction=day_raport)
QXE_BUTTON(-1,20,Status drukarki,varFunction=status)
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
